args.query: SELECT c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid, ch.field__c, ch.newvalue__c FROM "Case" c LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.status = 'Closed' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid, ch.field__c, ch.newvalue__c FROM "Case" c LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.status = 'Closed' AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL;

result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 23:   AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))/3600.0)...
                                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH cleaned_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.ownerid LIKE '#%%' THEN SUBSTR(c.ownerid, 2)
      ELSE c.ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) = 1
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cleaned_owner_cases
GROUP BY clean_owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH cleaned_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(c.ownerid, 2)
      ELSE c.ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) = 1
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cleaned_owner_cases
GROUP BY clean_owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
WITH cleaned_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(c.ownerid, 2)
      ELSE c.ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) = 1
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cleaned_owner_cases
GROUP BY clean_owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH cleaned_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(c.ownerid, 2)
      ELSE c.ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) = 1
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::TIMESTAMP - createddate::TIMESTAMP))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cleaned_owner_cases
GROUP BY clean_owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
WITH cleaned_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN c.ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(c.ownerid, 2)
      ELSE c.ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) = 1
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as case_count,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::TIMESTAMP - createddate::TIMESTAMP))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM cleaned_owner_cases
GROUP BY clean_owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 5;

args.query:
SELECT 
  ch.caseid__c,
  ch.field__c,
  ch.newvalue__c,
  ch.createddate
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.caseid__c IN (
  SELECT id 
  FROM "Case" 
  WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND status = 'Closed'
    AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
)
AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
  ch.caseid__c,
  ch.field__c,
  ch.newvalue__c,
  ch.createddate
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.caseid__c IN (
  SELECT id 
  FROM "Case" 
  WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND status = 'Closed'
    AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
)
AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

args.query:
WITH case_owner_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND
    c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
single_owner_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    createddate,
    closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(ownerid, 2)
      ELSE ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id
  FROM case_owner_counts
  WHERE owner_assignment_count = 1
  OR (owner_assignment_count = 0 AND createddate = closeddate)
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  id as case_id,
  createddate,
  closeddate,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::TIMESTAMP - createddate::TIMESTAMP))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
FROM single_owner_cases
ORDER BY clean_owner_id, createddate;

single_owner_cases AS (

    CASE 
      WHEN ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(ownerid, 2)
      ELSE ownerid 
    END as clean_owner_id
  FROM case_owner_counts
  WHERE owner_assignment_count = 1
  OR (owner_assignment_count = 0 AND createddate = closeddate)
)
SELECT 
  clean_owner_id as agent_id,
  id as case_id,
  createddate,
  closeddate,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::TIMESTAMP - createddate::TIMESTAMP))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
FROM single_owner_cases
ORDER BY clean_owner_id, createddate;

args.query:
WITH case_assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    case_id,
    createddate,
    closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(ownerid, 2)
      ELSE ownerid 
    END as agent_id
  FROM case_assignment_counts
  WHERE owner_assignment_count = 1
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::TIMESTAMP - createddate::TIMESTAMP))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  case_count,
  avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_stats
WHERE case_count > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id as case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' THEN 1 END) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE 
    c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND 
    c.createddate <= '2023-09-02' AND
    c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND
    c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02' AND
    c.status = 'Closed'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, c.ownerid
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    case_id,
    createddate,
    closeddate,
    CASE 
      WHEN ownerid LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTR(ownerid, 2)
      ELSE ownerid 
    END as agent_id
  FROM case_assignment_counts
  WHERE owner_assignment_count = 1
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::TIMESTAMP - createddate::TIMESTAMP))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  case_count,
  avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_stats
WHERE case_count > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10;
